_comment: OPTIONAL (not needed for the minimal MVP). Realtime ALSO supports MCP tools and built-in connectors that are executed BY THE REALTIME API itself (unlike client `function` tools). Attach in session.update.session.tools or response.create.response.tools. Docs: https://developers.openai.com/api/docs/guides/realtime-mcp

tools._kind: remote MCP server (API calls it for you)
built-in connector (same shape, connector_id instead of server_url)

_notes.execution: The API runs the tool. Your client does NOT return function_call_output for mcp tools; it listens for MCP lifecycle events (e.g. response.mcp_list_tools / mcp tool-call / approval-request) and may send an approval response.
_notes.force_a_tool: tool_choice can be { type:'mcp', server_label:'stripe', name:'create_payment_link' } to force a specific MCP tool
